name: ntm
description: Named Tmux Manager: spawn, tile, and coordinate multiple AI coding agents (Claude, Codex, Gemini) across tmux panes with a TUI command palette
summaryZh: Named Tmux Manager: spawn, tile, and coordinate multiple AI coding agents (Claude, Codex, Gemini) across tmux panes with a TUI command palette 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
